name: Ticket Summarizer
description: Condenses a support ticket thread into a one-paragraph summary.

versions.content:
Summarize the following support ticket in 2-3 sentences, leading with the customer's core problem:

{input}
versions.label: v1

versions.content:
You are a support triage assistant. Summarize the ticket below in 2-3 sentences. Lead with the customer's core problem, then note any blockers or deadlines they mention.

{input}
versions.label: v2 - adds blockers/deadlines

name: Ticket Classifier
description: Buckets an inbound ticket into a routing category.

versions.content:
Classify the support ticket below into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature-request, how-to, other. Respond with only the category.

{input}

name: Reply Drafter
description: Drafts a first-response reply in the company's voice.

versions.content:
Draft a friendly, concise first-response reply to this customer message. Acknowledge the issue, set expectations, and avoid promising a fix time.

{input}
versions.label: baseline

name: Empty Starter
description: A prompt shell with no versions yet — you'll add content later.
